creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Hi,

On Tue, 14 Sep 2010 05:38:07 GMT, pgollucci@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Request feedback please run portlint ; WARN:
> /space/portstrees/pr/ports/www/encode-explorer/pkg-plist: Both
> %%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%'' and %%PORTDOCS%%@unexec %D/%%DOCSDIR%%
> 2>/dev/null || true'' are missing.  At least one should be used.

thanks for the hint.
I've changed the "dirrmtry" to "dirrm". Please find a new shar archive
attached.


Bye
- Frank
